languages.text: "Но что если я скажу, что до Риззы доходили слухи о последнем месте стоянки "Семи кровавых стигмат"? Представьте, какой куш может сорвать везунчик, который найдет этот крейсер — не только клад, но и сам корабль. Как думаете, удивило бы вас, если бы у Риззы были такие сведения?"

traits.locale_text: "Но что если я скажу, что до Риззы доходили слухи о последнем месте стоянки "Семи кровавых стигмат"? Представьте, какой куш может сорвать везунчик, который найдет этот крейсер — не только клад, но и сам корабль. Как думаете, удивило бы вас, если бы у Риззы были такие сведения?"

languages.text: "Now what if I told you that old Ryzza has heard a rumour about where the Seven Bloody Stigmata last stopped? Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"
languages.original_text: "Но что если я скажу, что до Риззы доходили слухи о последнем месте стоянки "Семи кровавых стигмат"? Представьте, какой куш может сорвать везунчик, который найдет этот крейсер — не только клад, но и сам корабль. Как думаете, удивило бы вас, если бы у Риззы были такие сведения?"

traits.locale_text: "Now what if I told you that old Ryzza has heard a rumor about where the Seven Bloody Stigmata last stopped? Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

"Now what if I told you that old Ryzza has heard a rumour about where the Seven Bloody Stigmata last stopped? Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

languages.text: « Et si je vous disais que la vieille Ryzza a entendu une rumeur indiquant où ce fameux croiseur avait fait halte pour la dernière fois ? Si quelqu'un réussit un jour à le trouver, cette personne mettra la main sur un vrai trésor : non seulement la cargaison, mais aussi le vaisseau lui-même. Alors, ça vous surprendrait si Ryzza détenait cette information ? Que feriez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: "Now what if I told you that old Ryzza has heard a rumour about where the Seven Bloody Stigmata last stopped? Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

traits.locale_text: « Et si je vous disais que la vieille Ryzza a entendu une rumeur indiquant où ce fameux croiseur avait fait halte pour la dernière fois ? Si quelqu'un réussit un jour à le trouver, cette personne mettra la main sur un vrai trésor : non seulement la cargaison, mais aussi le vaisseau lui-même. Alors, ça vous surprendrait si Ryzza détenait cette information ? Que feriez-vous ? »

languages.text: "Was wäre, wenn ich dir sagen würde, dass der alte Ryzza ein Gerücht darüber gehört hat, wo die Sieben Blutigen Stigmata zuletzt angelegt haben? Stellt euch vor, was der glückliche Finder dieses Kreuzers erbeuten könnte — nicht nur den Schatz, sondern auch das Schiff selbst. Was meint Ihr — würde es Euch überraschen, wenn Ryzza diese Information hätte?"
languages.original_text: "Now what if I told you that old Ryzza has heard a rumour about where the Seven Bloody Stigmata last stopped? Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

traits.locale_text: "Was wäre, wenn ich dir sagen würde, dass der alte Ryzza ein Gerücht darüber gehört hat, wo die Sieben Blutigen Stigmata zuletzt angelegt haben? Stellt euch vor, was der glückliche Finder dieses Kreuzers erbeuten könnte — nicht nur den Schatz, sondern auch das Schiff selbst. Was meint Ihr — würde es Euch überraschen, wenn Ryzza diese Information hätte?"

languages.text: "¿Y si te dijera que el viejo Ryzza ha oído un rumor sobre dónde pararon por última vez los Siete Estigmas Sangrientos? Imagínate el botín que podría llevarse el afortunado que encontrara este crucero, no sólo el tesoro, sino también el propio barco. ¿Qué dices? ¿Te sorprendería que Ryzza tuviera esta información?".
languages.original_text: "Now what if I told you that old Ryzza has heard a rumour about where the Seven Bloody Stigmata last stopped? Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

traits.locale_text: "¿Y si te dijera que el viejo Ryzza ha oído un rumor sobre dónde pararon por última vez los Siete Estigmas Sangrientos? Imagínate el botín que podría llevarse el afortunado que encontrara este crucero, no sólo el tesoro, sino también el propio barco. ¿Qué dices? ¿Te sorprendería que Ryzza tuviera esta información?".

languages.text: "Şimdi size yaşlı Ryzza'nın Yedi Kanlı Stigmata'nın en son nerede durduğuna dair bir söylenti duyduğunu söylesem? Bu kruvazörü bulan şanslı kişinin alabileceği skoru bir hayal edin — sadece hazineyi değil, geminin kendisini de. Ne dersiniz — Ryzza'nın bu bilgiye sahip olması sizi şaşırtır mı?"
languages.original_text: "Now what if I told you that old Ryzza has heard a rumour about where the Seven Bloody Stigmata last stopped? Just imagine the score that the lucky finder of this cruiser could take — not just the treasure, but the ship itself too. What do you say — would you be surprised if Ryzza were to have this information?"

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi size yaşlı Ryzza'nın Yedi Kanlı Stigmata'nın en son nerede durduğuna dair bir söylenti duyduğunu söylesem? Bu kruvazörü bulan şanslı kişinin alabileceği skoru bir hayal edin — sadece hazineyi değil, geminin kendisini de. Ne dersiniz — Ryzza'nın bu bilgiye sahip olması sizi şaşırtır mı?"
